---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or analytics workflow you'd like Hooplytics to support
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What analytical question are you trying to answer that Hooplytics doesn't help with today? What's the workflow you wish existed?

## Proposed solution

What would the feature look like? Mock UI, example CLI invocation, or pseudocode is great if you have it.

```bash
# Example: how you'd want to call this from the CLI
hooplytics ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Anything you tried (or thought about) that didn't work, and why.

## Surface(s)

Which parts of Hooplytics should this touch?

- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Streamlit dashboard
- [ ] Jupyter notebook
- [ ] Modeling / RACE bundles
- [ ] PDF reports
- [ ] Docs

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to similar tools, papers, or anything else useful.

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched [existing issues](https://github.com/texasbe2trill/hooplytics/issues?q=is%3Aissue) and this isn't a duplicate.
- [ ] This is a feature request — for questions or discussion, [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/texasbe2trill/hooplytics/discussions) is a better fit.
